name: Never Fail Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a 4-quart microwave-safe bowl.
2. Microwave at medium-high for 2 minutes and 30 seconds. Remove and stir until well blended.
3. Return to the microwave and cook at medium-high for another 5 minutes. Remove and stir until smooth.
4. Repeat Step 3.
5. Return to the microwave and cook at medium-high for 6 minutes. Remove and stir in chocolate, vanilla, and nuts until thick.
6. Pour into a 9x9-inch pan and allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
